title: rubus koefalvianus
intro: Rubus koefalvianus, also known as the Koefel's raspberry or wild raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanin content, which has been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus koefalvianus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
